backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing user profiles, admin users, permissions, and super admin initialization with access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing weather forecast feature requirements, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files describing their purpose and UI behavior.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app routing setup using TanStack Router with extensive page imports and query client provider.
frontend/src/components/Banner.tsx: Component that fetches and displays the current banner image with caching, fallback handling, and GIF detection.
frontend/src/components/BannerManager.ts: Admin interface for uploading, validating, and managing banner images via file upload or URL with progress and error handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with school info, contact details, social link, and an animated copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Implements a navigation header with data‑driven menus, mobile drawer, and authentication‑aware actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main page layout including banner, header, routed content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Displays a stylized page header with optional background styles and graceful image‑error fallback.
frontend/src/components/PhilippineTimeCl: Shows a live Philippine Standard Time clock updated every second.
frontend/src/components/SchoolActivities: Fetches slider images from the backend and displays them in an autoplaying, looping carousel with fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/WeatherForecastS: Displays current weather and a 3‑day forecast for Barobo using data from the weather hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBaroboWeather.ts: Fetches and parses current weather and a 3‑day forecast for Barobo from the Open‑Meteo API.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, exposing identity state, login, logout, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines multiple React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data, including user profiles, roles, permissions, and admin management.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind base styles, theme variables, dark mode overrides, and custom UI styling including editors and menu backgrounds.
frontend/src/lib/imageProxy.ts: Utilities for proxying and validating cloud-hosted image and video URLs with backend-assisted conversion and detailed error handling.
frontend/src/lib/urlConverter.ts: Converts various cloud storage sharing URLs into direct media URLs with provider-specific pattern handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app by wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ActionResearchPage.ts: Displays an informational page about action research with sections on research areas and the research process.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Renders the admin dashboard with role-based access, navigation, and cards for various admin management features.
frontend/src/pages/AdvisoriesCircularsPa: Shows a placeholder page indicating that advisories and circulars will be posted in the future.
Provides an authenticated admin interface to edit alumni content and create, update, or delete alumni profiles.
frontend/src/pages/AlumniPage.tsx: Displays alumni content and profiles with loading, error handling, and formatted sections for engagement and achievements.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsDashboardPag: Super-admin-only analytics dashboard showing visitor and login statistics with charts and summary cards.
frontend/src/pages/ARALProgramPage.tsx: Renders a static informational page describing the ARAL Program using card components and a page header.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivedIssuancesPage: Shows a placeholder for archived issuances, indicating content will be added later.
Renders the banner management interface with a header and embedded BannerManager component.

project_state.json: Defines project metadata, architecture notes, known issues, existing features, and pending feature requests for weather forecast and role consistency fixes.
